sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing. He denies chest pain, dyspnea, or syncope. He admits to a past habit of vaping and smoking. The patient uses Zyrtec in the spring, summer, and fall for seasonal allergy symptoms, which tend to work well. The patient reports airplane-induced anxiety. The patient reports a cough.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal. Ears have some wax. The patient's lungs sound terrific.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has orthostatic dizziness. The patient has asthma. The patient has a peanut allergy.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order albuterol as needed. Order Zyrtec as needed. Order an epinephrine auto-injector refill. Schedule a breathing test in four months. Recommend stepping down to alvesco. Arrange follow-up in four months.
